title: Myth of Telepinu: The Vanishing God
description: The fertility god vanishes in rage and all life withers.
introduction: The fertility god vanishes in rage and all life withers.

translation.text: Telepinu flew into a rage. He put his right shoe on his left foot. Mist seized the windows. The sheep rejected their lambs. Barley and wheat no longer grew. A bee found him and stung him awake. A ritual of purification calmed his anger.
